_comment: Evaluation fixture: real ToolUniverse tool outputs captured for PMEL (gp100) in melanoma, keyed by (tool_name, arg-signature). The replay executor (eval/run_eval.py) serves the `raw` payload for each call so the CSO's tool_router.yaml summary paths dig into it exactly as they would a live response. Captured 2026-07-05 via the MCP ToolUniverse server; raw payloads trimmed to the digested fields + a human note. Live sources linked in the report provenance.
query: Assess PMEL (gp100) as a therapeutic target in melanoma

gwas_get_snps_for_gene:PMEL._note: 120 catalogued SNPs in the PMEL locus, mostly pigmentation/intronic; PMEL not the closest gene to the lead SNP. Weak germline support — expected, non-disqualifying for a melanocyte differentiation antigen.

CellMarker_search_by_gene:PMEL._note: PMEL marks BOTH melanoma cancer cells AND normal melanocytes + retinal pigment epithelium. On-target/off-tumour liability: melanocyte + ocular toxicity — the known gp100 safety axis.

search_clinical_trials:PMEL:melanoma._note: 20 gp100 trials across three modalities; the IMCgp100/tebentafusp bispecific-TCR lineage is the validated clinical path (approved in uveal melanoma). Modality de-risked.

OpenTargets_get_evidence_by_datasource:P._note: 2953 target-disease evidence rows, literature-dominated (europepmc, top score 0.84). Strong but literature-weighted association, not genetic.
